About Us

The Jolo provides its guests with the most comfortable, modern & high-quality facilities, ensuring a home-like experience in the best locations of Cyprus

The Jolo Vacation Rentals started in 2018 and offers amazing apartments next to the most beautiful beaches of Limassol and Latchi. 

In 2024 we opened Luxury  The Villa Jolo in the unique place near Paphos - Latchi.  The Jolo provides it’s guests with the most comfortable, modern & high-quality facilities. The design and arrangement is thought through to the smallest detail. The rentals  are equipped with everything necessary to make you feel like at home. 

The location will be convenient for all guests, regardless of the purpose of your stay. For the last 3 years we have one of the highest  rates in booking.com for our apartments in Limassol.

  • 2018

    Jolo Vacation Rentals was founded

  • 2024

    Opened Luxury The Villa Jolo near Paphos (Latchi)

  • 3 years

    Among the top-rated on Booking.com for our apartments in Limassol
